title: Google Doc Integration

posts.author: HannahS (Hanna Smaglis)
posts.cookedHtml: My team does a lot of collaborative work with clients where many of their tasks, notes, and work is done in a google doc. It would expedite the line of communication of Google docs could integrate with Monday and communicate on Monday is a task is created/ assigned, a comment is left, edits are made or attachments are placed.
